arguments.code:
def cal_sum(n):
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(2, n+1):
        c = a + b
        a, b = b, c
    return a

# Test cases
assert cal_sum(9) == 87
assert cal_sum(10) == 142
assert cal_sum(11) == 230

arguments.answer:
The function to calculate the sum of Perrin numbers is as follows: def cal_sum(n):
    if n < 3:
        return 1
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(3, n+1):
        a, b = b, a + b
    return a
